network.title: Can't reach the network
network.description: Check your connection and try again. If you're on a proxy, make sure localhost is excluded.

timeout.title: This is taking too long
timeout.description: The request timed out before we heard back. Please try again.

auth.title: Your session has expired
auth.description: Please sign in again to continue.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: Your account doesn't have permission to do this.

not_found.title: Not found
not_found.description: This may have been deleted, or the link is no longer valid.

validation.title: That request wasn't valid
validation.description: Please check your input and try again.

rate_limit.title: Too many requests
rate_limit.description: Please wait a few seconds and try again.

server.title: Service temporarily unavailable
server.description: Something went wrong on our end — we've logged it. Please try again shortly.

unknown.title: Something went wrong
unknown.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again shortly.
